title: Goofy Traps
description: Some random traps I made in MCreator that are mostly from home alone.
body:
This mod adds a ton of traps that are mostly from home alone because why not.
It adds toy trains that you can put on the floor and entities can slip on
It adds a hot door that when opened suddenly burns everything around it
It adds slippery stairs (they're kinda bugged though they only work on the top)
It adds fake gel that when used on dirt or cobblestone makes it fake
It adds a paint bucket that you can bonk people with. lmao
